title: Reviewer Output
description: Schema for the structured JSON the Codex Reviewer subagent emits inside <!-- REVIEWER_JSON --> ... <!-- /REVIEWER_JSON --> blocks in PR bodies. Consumed by scripts/validate_reviewer.py and (Phase 4) scripts/route_pr.py.

summary.description: One- to three-sentence human-readable TL;DR of the review. Drives no automation; for human skim only.

findings.description: Structured findings. The Phase 4 Router branches on this array.

id.description: Stable internal ID for this finding (e.g., 'F1', 'F2'). Lets PR threads reference findings by ID.

type.description: Categorical failure mode. Eleven enum values cover the orthogonal review concerns; new types require a schema bump.

severity.description: critical => blocks merge (Phase 4 routes to 'blocked'); warning => human should look; nit => style/preference.

requirement_ids.description: Spec requirement IDs this finding relates to (e.g., ['R1'], ['REQ-FAREWELL-02']). Empty array if the finding is repo-wide rather than tied to a specific requirement.

evidence.description: Pointer to the specific code or spec location supporting the finding (e.g., 'src/farewell.py:18', 'spec ## Decisions D2').

coverage.description: Quantitative requirement and test coverage. Phase 4 Router may gate on requirements_covered == requirements_total.

requirements_total.description: Count of R* / REQ-* IDs in the spec's Requirements section.

requirements_covered.description: Count of those requirements the implementation actually satisfies.

tests_expected.description: Count of T* IDs in the spec's Test Plan section.

tests_present.description: Count of those tests actually present in the diff.

risk_assessment.description: Categorical risk along three orthogonal axes.

scope_fit.description: Does the diff implement exactly what the spec authorized? over_scope = added unrequested features; under_scope = missed requirements.

invariant_risk.description: Likelihood the change violates an INV* in the spec or in AGENTS.md invariants.

production_risk.description: Likelihood the change causes a production incident if shipped without further review.

confidence.description: Reviewer's self-reported confidence in this review, 0-100. Phase 4 Router gates auto-merge on confidence >= 60 by default.
